title: More
writer: Paul Gégauff, Barbet Schroeder, Mimsy Farmer
actors: Mimsy Farmer, Klaus Grünberg, Heinz Engelmann
plot: Stefan, a recent college graduate, hitchhikes from Germany to Paris where he meets American expatriate, Estelle. They chase the sun to Ibiza. An idyllic island life degenerates when she introduces him to heroin and they get addicted.
